expertAssessments.rationale: B4/B5 command guidance closure retest passed with concrete Nginx/NFS command output and no visible clarification interception.

Nginx 5xx path analysis and NFS remount command guidance returned actionable operations commands.

completedImprovements.title: Operations command guidance prompts are intercepted by clarification dialog before AI request dispatch

completedImprovements.note: Clarification bypass for concrete operations command/procedure prompts is covered by clarification-generator regression tests.
